actor_claims.quote_text: Stewart G. MacDonald, Jr., our chief executive officer
Mac-Gray's stockholder, Moab Partners, L.P. and certain of its affiliates, which we refer collectively to as Moab
Mr. Rothenberg is a co-founder and the General Partner of Moab

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: the possibility that the strategic alternatives process might result in third parties who would be interested in partnering with Mr. MacDonald (either through continued employment and/or contribution of some or all of his existing equity, a so-called equity "rollover")
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: possible contribution of some or all of his existing equity

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: to the extent Moab might have an interest in an equity rollover of all or a portion of Moab's shares of Mac-Gray common stock in connection with any sale transaction that might result from the Board's strategic alternatives process
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: possible equity rollover of all or a portion of Moab's shares

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: Mr. Rothenberg is a co-founder and the General Partner of Moab

event_claims.description: The Transaction Committee considered that third parties might partner with Mr. MacDonald through continued employment or contribution of existing equity as an equity rollover, creating potentially unaligned interests.
event_claims.quote_text: In this regard, the Transaction Committee considered the fact that, in view of the significant stock ownership of Mr. MacDonald and his family, coupled with the possibility that the strategic alternatives process might result in third parties who would be interested in partnering with Mr. MacDonald (either through continued employment and/or contribution of some or all of his existing equity, a so-called equity "rollover"), Mr. MacDonald could have interests that would not be aligned with other Mac-Gray stockholders.

event_claims.description: The Transaction Committee determined to recommend that Mr. MacDonald generally not participate in evaluation of strategic alternatives or negotiations with interested parties.
event_claims.quote_text: As such, the Transaction Committee determined to recommend to the Board at an upcoming meeting that, as a general matter, Mr. MacDonald should not be permitted to participate in the Board's evaluation of strategic alternatives or any negotiations with any interested parties in a sale process.

event_claims.description: Participants discussed that if Moab had an interest in an equity rollover of its Mac-Gray shares, Mr. Rothenberg would need to be excluded from the process from the outset.
event_claims.quote_text: At the meeting with Mr. Rothenberg, the participants discussed that, to the extent Moab might have an interest in an equity rollover of all or a portion of Moab's shares of Mac-Gray common stock in connection with any sale transaction that might result from the Board's strategic alternatives process, Mr. Rothenberg would need to be excluded from the process from the outset.

event_claims.description: The Board decided, and Mr. MacDonald agreed, that Mr. MacDonald would be excluded from evaluation of strategic alternatives and negotiations with third parties due to the possibility that he could be asked to partner with a potential acquiror.
event_claims.quote_text: Following this discussion, the Board decided, and Mr. MacDonald and Mr. Rothenberg agreed, that it would be appropriate to exclude Mr. MacDonald and Mr. Rothenberg from the Board's evaluation of strategic alternatives and any negotiations with third parties that might take place.

event_claims.description: The Board decided, and Mr. Rothenberg agreed, that Mr. Rothenberg would be excluded from evaluation of strategic alternatives and negotiations with third parties due to the possibility that Moab could be asked to partner with a potential acquiror.
event_claims.quote_text: Following this discussion, the Board decided, and Mr. MacDonald and Mr. Rothenberg agreed, that it would be appropriate to exclude Mr. MacDonald and Mr. Rothenberg from the Board's evaluation of strategic alternatives and any negotiations with third parties that might take place.
